what_it_does: This file stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment that registers an image asset in the design-assets channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Stages_Gold
standouts: References an image asset via the image://design-assets/icons/Stages_Gold URI
Serves as a ledger record linking an attachment id to a design-assets channel image
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Id prefix att- for attachment records
Target expressed as a channel-scoped URI
concerns: Target URI lacks file extension, dimensions, or version information
No alt text, content hash, or author field
Added timestamp is future-dated relative to the present
notes: A lightweight attachment ledger entry that points the design-assets channel to a Stages_Gold icon image via a custom URI scheme.
questions: What visual content does Stages_Gold represent?
What file format and resolution does the target image have?
Who created or uploaded this attachment?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment, and the content does exactly that.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register an image attachment so that systems can locate and reference the Stages_Gold icon within the design-assets channel.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme to address the target asset.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, timestamped attachment record that maps a stable id to a design-assets image target.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-df97d8f9 in the design-assets channel that targets the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Stages_Gold.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register and locate a Stages_Gold icon image attachment within the design-assets channel.
